text: Hello? Hi, this is Lisa. How are you doing today? I'm calling because in the recent update, the government has introduced final expense insurance plans at a highly subsidized rate that you may qualify for. To check if you qualify, so can you please confirm, are you between 40 and 85 years old? Can you hear me?
